message.content:
@startuml
title 解析处理@EnableTransactionManagement注解

participant "ConfigurationClassPostProcessor" as ConfigClassPostProcessor
participant "ConfigurationClassParser" as ConfigClassParser
participant "ComponentScanAnnotationParser" as ComponentScanAnnotationParser
participant "AdviceModelImportSelector" as AdviceModelImportSelector
participant "TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector" as TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
participant "ConfigurationClass" as ConfigurationClass
participant "ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader" as ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
participant "AutoProxyRegistrar" as AutoProxyRegistrar
participant "AopConfigUtils" as AopConfigUtils

participant "配置类PostProcessor" as ConfigClassPostProcessor
participant "配置类解析器" as ConfigClassParser
participant "组件扫描注解解析器" as ComponentScanAnnotationParser
participant "Advice模型导入选择器" as AdviceModelImportSelector
participant "事务管理配置选择器" as TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
participant "配置类" as ConfigurationClass
participant "配置类Bean定义读取器" as ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
participant "自动代理注册器" as AutoProxyRegistrar
participant "Aop配置工具" as AopConfigUtils

postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry as postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry

postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry
    :parseAnnotationMetadata metadata, String beanName
    :processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)
    :doProcessConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass, SourceClass sourceClass)

alt [根据被解析的Class@ComponentScan注解，进行扫描]
    :@ComponentScan扫描
    :parseAnnotationAttributes componentScan, final String declaringClass
    :parseString className, String beanName
    :processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)
    :通过解析扫描到的类
    :获取到AutoProxyRegistrar, ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
    :selectImports(AnnotationMetadata)
    :selectImports(AdviceMode)
    :添加AutoProxyRegistrar, AspectAutoProxyRegistrar到关联配置类
    :即标记@EnableTransactionManagement的类
    :将ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrs属性中
    :按照普通配置类处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
    :解析完配置类
    :加载配置类的配置信息
    :loadBeanDefinitions
end

alt 配置类PostProcessor
    :loadBeanDefinitionsForConfigurationClass
    :registerBeanDefinitionForImportedConfigurationClass
    :处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration，导入了切面beanFactoryTransactionAttributeSourceAdvisor
    :加载BeanDefinitionsForBeanMethod
    :加载BeanDefinitionsFromImportedResources
    :处理@Bean标记的注册方法
    :处理AutoProxyRegistrar，注册了InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
    :处理@Import, 导入了ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar类
    :registerBeanDefinitions
    :注册InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
    :registerAutoProxyCreatorIfNecessary
end

@enduml
